compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for overlay dispatch logic
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Create tests/hooks/test-overlay-dispatch.sh with failing tests for the three dispatch branches: parallel (deterministic signal), serial (tier reviewer flag), and no-overlay.

### Test approach
Create mock classifier output with security_overlay=true, call the dispatch function and assert overlay agent is invoked in parallel. Create mock classifier output with both false but tier reviewer summary containing security_overlay_warranted=yes, assert serial dispatch. Create mock with all false, assert no overlay dispatch. Test graceful degradation: simulate overlay agent timeout, assert commit is not blocked.

### Files to create
- tests/hooks/test-overlay-dispatch.sh

### .test-index requirement
Source file will be REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md or a dispatch script. Test name test-overlay-dispatch.sh will need .test-index mapping since it does not fuzzy-match a single source file.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests FAIL (RED)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-overlay-dispatch.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] At least 4 test cases (parallel, serial, no-overlay, graceful degradation)
  Verify: grep -c "^test_\|--- test_" tests/hooks/test-overlay-dispatch.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry added
  Verify: grep -q "overlay-dispatch" .test-index
